item.title: Exploring the River’s Secrets
item.description: A calm look at mudlarking on the Thames foreshore, where Nicola White explores historical finds and the stories they can reveal. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in.

item.title: A Mudlarking Find Reveals a Forgotten Story
item.description: A muddy Thames find leads Nicola White to a forgotten story from the river foreshore. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames.

item.title: A Rolex Find on the Thames Foreshore
item.description: Nicola White explores a Thames foreshore find and considers whether it could be a real Rolex. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames

item.title: A Pot Found While Mudlarking
item.description: Nicola White explores the Thames foreshore and shares the story behind a pot found while mudlarking. A mudlarking permit from the Port of London Authority is required in order to mudlark on the River Thames.
